item.name: Sunspun Cumulus Seed
item.description: The incantation on this enchanted scroll is believed to call forth a cloud gold as the sun and fleet as the wind.

mount.name: Sunspun Cumulus
mount.action: Summon forth the sunspun cumulus. It is unclear whether its previous owner was a boy with a tail or simply a monkey.
mount.description: There is but one man in all of Hydaelyn who can create such a mystical masterpiece, and it is said he resides upon a misty peak hidden within the mountain ranges of Doma. Crafted by stitching together dozens of smaller clouds dyed golden by the sun, this cumulus is said to bring good fortune to its rider.
mount.tooltip:
If you live with your head
in the clouds, sooner or later
you'll find yourself on your rear.
- Brangwine
